narrative:
Brunswick City has 23,730 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
